HANDOFF: HANDOFF.md when session transfer, role switch, delegation, AFK, compaction, or recovery is in scope
EXPERIMENT_PROGRAM: .pfo/EXPERIMENT_PROGRAM.md when autonomous measurement-driven iteration is in scope
BRANCH_FINISH: BRANCH_FINISH.md when branch cleanup or PR is in scope
LEARNING_PROMOTION: .codex-memory/LEARNING_PROPOSALS.json when repeated-error promotion is in scope

noSkipRules: MODULAR_BUILD requires BLUEPRINT_GENERATION and EXECUTION_PLAN_GENERATION artifacts.
Broad BUILD scope requires IDEA_GATE not to be KILL and MARKET_VALIDATION to name exit criteria.
Autonomous or delegated execution requires UNIT_CONTEXT_MANIFEST.
Each major implementation iteration requires NEXT_STEP.md and user approval or a changed direction before build starts.
Autonomous or delegated execution requires EXECUTION_POLICY and VERIFICATION_CONTRACT.
Measurement-driven self-improvement requires EXPERIMENT_PROGRAM and EXPERIMENT_EVALUATION.
Experiment loops must protect the evaluation harness and record baseline, metric, budget, and keep/discard/crash status.
Session transfer, role switch, delegation, AFK, compaction, or recovery requires HANDOFF.
Behavior changes require TDD_EVIDENCE unless explicitly waived.
Bugfix units require ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS before implementation.
TWO_STAGE_REVIEW requires spec compliance before code quality.
UNIT_VERIFICATION must fail closed when evidence is missing or ambiguous.
Product iteration requires feedback, metric, validation, or strategy-decision evidence.
Repeated errors must promote through LEARNING_PROMOTION before changing runtime rules.
SESSION_PERSISTENCE runs after every major milestone.
